value.stringValue: Qualification Found but no MPR Found
Multiple Payment Rules Found - Unable to apply MPR
Rates Successfully Assigned from Custom Rule
Rates Successfully Assigned from Job Role Highest Level
Rates Successfully Assigned from Job Role
Rates will inherit from Rate Calculator

Flow.description: Before Save Flow that assigns rates based upon the related Job Role and Contact on the Shift record.
Flow.label: Shift Rates Managment

recordLookups.name: Get_All_Payment_Rules
recordLookups.label: Get All Payment Rules
recordLookups.filterLogic: 4 AND 5 AND 8 AND (6 OR 7) AND (1 OR 2 OR 3)

recordLookups.name: Get_Custom_Rule_MPR
recordLookups.label: Get Custom Rule MPR
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 9 AND (7 OR 8)

recordLookups.name: Get_Employee_Minimum_Pay_Rate
recordLookups.label: Get Employee Minimum Pay Rate
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 9 AND (7 OR 8)

recordLookups.name: Get_Employee_Minimum_Pay_Rate1
recordLookups.label: Get Employee Minimum Pay Rate
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 9 AND (7 OR 8)

recordLookups.name: Get_Higher_Minimum_Pay_Rate
recordLookups.label: Get Higher Minimum Pay Rate
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 9 AND (7 OR 8)

recordLookups.name: Get_Job_Role_Minimum_Pay_Rate
recordLookups.label: Get Job Role Minimum Pay Rate
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 9 AND (7 OR 8)

recordLookups.name: Get_Payment_Rule
recordLookups.label: Get Payment Rule
recordLookups.filterLogic: 4 AND 5 AND 8 AND (1 OR 2 OR 3) AND (6 OR 7)

start.filterFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.sirenum__Team__r.tc9_ext_sirint__Inherit_Rate_Calculator_Values_From__c}, "Assignment"), OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED({!$Record.sirenum__Contact__c}), ISCHANGED({!$Record.sirenum__Team__c}), AND( ISCHANGED({!$Record.Re_run_Rates_Assignment__c}), {!$Record.Re_run_Rates_Assignment__c} = TRUE ) ))
